minority_reports.title: Data model scope boundary
minority_reports.content: ACI-002 establishes persistence and schemas only. No execution UI or workflow logic is included. Operator may perceive incomplete product until ACI-003.
minority_reports.mission: Establish JSON-backed execution data model without premature UI scope creep.
minority_reports.human_summary: Foundation and data model are complete. UI shell and Job Order workflow exist. Operator awareness features are now in scope.
minority_reports.current_truth: Read-only cockpit and Job Order CRUD are operational.
minority_reports.completed: Repository foundation, data model, UI shell, Job Order workflow
minority_reports.remaining: Operator Actions and Minority Report editing with rotation
minority_reports.risk: Operators may expect full execution engine before it is implemented
minority_reports.next_truth: Operator Actions and Minority Reports are editable with automatic rotation
minority_reports.next_action: Complete ACI-005 validation and operator testing
minority_reports.target: Mission status understandable from dashboard within seconds
